ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the sector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_disposal" (
  "waste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste disposal record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the waste belongs to */,
  "waste_disposed" REAL /* Amount of waste disposed */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., tons, kilograms) */,
  "disposal_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste was disposed */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste disposal facility */,
  "disposal_method" TEXT /* Method of waste disposal (e.g., landfill, incineration) */,
  "recycling_rate" REAL /* Percentage of waste that was recycled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waste disposal record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waste disposal record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_disposal_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greenhouse_gases" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each greenhouse gas record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the gas belongs to */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 emissions */,
  "ch4" REAL /* CH4 emissions */,
  "n2o" REAL /* N2O emissions */,
  "co2e" REAL /* CO2 equivalent emissions */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the greenhouse gas emissions were measured */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of emissions */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the greenhouse gas record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the greenhouse gas record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenhouse_gases_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the land use belongs to */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., agricultural, residential) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of land use */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the land use change occurred */,
  "previous_use" TEXT /* Previous type of land use */,
  "current_use" TEXT /* Current type of land use */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the land use change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the land use record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the land use record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the building belongs to */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the building */,
  "building_address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last energy efficiency inspection */,
  "inspection_score" INTEGER /* Score from the last energy efficiency inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commercial_establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commercial establishment */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the establishment belongs to */,
  "establishment_type" TEXT /* Type of establishment (e.g., restaurant, retail) */,
  "waste_generated" REAL /* Waste generated by the establishment */,
  "establishment_address" TEXT /* Address of the commercial establishment */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the establishment */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sustainability audit */,
  "audit_score" INTEGER /* Score from the last sustainability audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the establishment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the establishment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commercial_establishments_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_reduction_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste reduction target */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the target belongs to */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year the target is set for */,
  "reduction_target" REAL /* Waste reduction target */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Year used as the baseline for the reduction target */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Value of waste generation in the baseline year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_reduction_targets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_reduction_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission reduction target */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the target belongs to */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year the target is set for */,
  "reduction_target" REAL /* Emission reduction target */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Year used as the baseline for the reduction target */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Value of greenhouse gas emissions in the baseline year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reduction_targets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., waste, emissions) */,
  "report_generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "issue_text" TEXT /* Text of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
